Hero.title: There is no system in the world more perfect than the one created by nature.

items.item2: No formation of phytotoxic breakdown products
items.item3: Working systems that allow achieving results

Complexs.title: Organo-mineral complexes "Foliart"
Complexs.desc1: The consumption of nutrients is a complex chain of sequential processes. If even one of its links is damaged, the whole chain is destroyed.
Complexs.desc2: A healthy cell is an example of an impeccable balance of all processes and components. The substances contained in it are in perfect harmony. Therefore, the main task in developing technologies for fertilizers and feeding is not to disrupt the natural order. Not a single nutrient, no hormone or amino acid is absorbed by plants just because they are available.

item2.title: High efficiency
item2.desc: is provided by direct action simultaneously on all organs and systems of plants: shoot, root, vascular, reproductive, enzymatic, hormonal, immune. While other products on the market affect only individual “links” of the absorption and processing chains and are unable to control a single process.

item3.title: No phytotoxic breakdown products of drugs are formed inside plant cells
item3.desc: in contrast to the use of salt forms of fertilizing.

item4.title: Laboratory support of the farm
item4.desc: Presence of specialized specialists on staff: phytopathologist, plant physiologist, agrochemist, entomologist.

item5.title: No specific product has magical properties. Therefore, we do not sell fertilizers, we sell working systems that allow achieving results
